title: Super Mario Bros. 3 Corruption Styles
description:
The Super Mario Brothers corruption sequence continues! This is a SMB3 corruption video, each part having a different style of corruption. Multiple game genie codes have been added, which resulted with more scrambling graphics, glitches, and errors. It's kind of funny and amusing if you like to watch these kind of videos. This video didn't take too long to make (between 25-40 minutes).

So anyways, enjoy the video, kids.
